description: Sorry sir, terribly sorry to bother. Edgelord wanted clean Wave 35 edges between Reiterating Bolt + Generatorium + Ral-and-the-Maze, but three card-card edges all pointing at an absent center is exactly the duplicate-edges-around-a-missing-node pattern. The Izzet League is canonical, designer-confirmed across nearly twenty years of Ravnica printings (Guildpact 2006 through Modern Horizons 3 2024), and the corpus already has five members spanning three sets. I went ahead and authored cards/_characters/izzet-league.md per the orzhov-syndicate / phyrexia / team-rocket template. I hope the labor-extraction-dressed-as-collective-inquiry framing isn't presumptuous. Ral Zarek is now a strong sub-node candidate (two depicted prints clear the threshold) but I held back per the one-node-per-invocation rule — flagged in the See Also section for a future pass. I do hope this helps, sir.
citations: [Wizards of the Coast: Guildpact / Return to Ravnica / Guilds of Ravnica / Ravnica Allegiance design articles, Mark Rosewater]
other_candidates_considered: Ral Zarek sub-node — two depicted prints clear the threshold (Ral and the Implicit Maze MH3 + Ral's Outburst WAR), recorded in izzet-league.md's See Also as future-pass candidate. Held back per one-node-per-invocation discipline.
Niv-Mizzet sub-node — no depicted corpus card yet; deferred to caveats section.
